The '''Tyerell family''' was an [[Aleena/Legends|Aleena]] family from [[Aleen/Legends|Aleen]]. One famous member of the family was professional [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] pilot [[Ratts Tyerell/Legends|Ratts Tyerell]]. His son [[Deland Tyerell/Legends|Deland]] also was a large opponent of the podracing industry after it killed Ratts.
